What We Do

Expert painting services
for every home.

From the first coat of primer to the final inspection, we bring precision and care to every job — interior and exterior, across greater Auckland.

01
Exterior Painting
Thorough surface preparation, high-quality exterior paints, and weather-resistant finishes designed to protect and beautify Auckland homes for years. We work with weatherboards, plaster, timber, and rendered surfaces.
02
Interior Painting
Careful preparation, expert plastering, and premium interior finishes that transform living spaces. We handle high-stud walls, ceilings, feature walls, and fine detail work with equal skill.
03
Gates & Metalwork
Specialist preparation and coating of wrought iron gates, fences, and metalwork. We strip, prime, and apply durable paint systems that resist corrosion and maintain their finish in Auckland's coastal climate.
04
Preparation & Restoration
The secret to a lasting finish is in the prep. We sand, fill, prime, and repair before a single topcoat goes on — including full scaffolding setups for multi-storey homes and heritage weatherboard restoration.
500+
Projects Completed
100%
Auckland-wide Coverage
5★
Customer Satisfaction

Workmanship Guarantee

Why Choose Us

The All Might
difference.

✦
Meticulous Preparation

We never skip prep. Proper sanding, priming, and filling is what separates a paint job that lasts from one that doesn't — and it's where we invest the most time.

✦
Premium Materials Only

We use leading paint brands selected for Auckland's climate — UV-stable, mould-resistant, and designed to hold their colour through our wet winters and coastal conditions.

✦
Auckland-wide Service

From the North Shore to Manukau, Waitākere to the Eastern Bays — we cover all of Auckland for both residential interior and exterior painting projects.

✦
Guaranteed Workmanship

We stand behind every job with a workmanship guarantee. If something isn't right, we make it right — no arguments, no excuses.

How It Works

From quote to finished result
in four steps.

01
Free Quote

We visit your property, assess the scope, and provide a detailed, no-obligation quote. No surprises, no hidden costs.

02
Surface Preparation

We protect your property, set up access equipment, and thoroughly prepare all surfaces — sanding, filling, priming, and masking.

03
Expert Application

Premium paints are applied using the right technique for every surface — brush, roller, or spray — for a consistent, professional finish.

04
Final Inspection

We walk through the completed work with you, tidy up completely, and ensure you're fully satisfied before we leave.
